programs.name: 15 Puzzle
programs.description: The classic 4x4 sliding tile puzzle. Arrange numbered tiles 1-15 in order. By Jeff Jetton.

programs.name: Apple 30th
programs.description: Graphics demo by Dave Schmenk celebrating the Apple's 30th anniversary.

programs.name: Applesoft BASIC
programs.description: Applesoft BASIC interpreter with floating-point support. Type NEW, enter your program, then RUN.

programs.name: Blackjack
programs.description: Casino-style Blackjack. Try to beat the dealer to 21 without going bust.

programs.name: Cellular Automaton
programs.description: Configurable 1D cellular automaton visualizer. By Will Scullin.

programs.name: Checkers
programs.description: Two-player checkers (draughts) game running on Integer BASIC.

programs.name: Hamurabi
programs.description: Govern ancient Sumeria over 10 years, managing grain, land, and a growing population.

programs.name: Hello
programs.description: Prints HELLO, APPLE I! to the screen.

programs.name: Life
programs.description: Conway's Game of Life in 6502 machine code. By John Conway and Larry Nelson.

programs.name: Little Tower
programs.description: A text adventure game for the Apple 1.

programs.name: Lunar Lander
programs.description: Guide a lunar module to a safe landing by controlling engine burn rate.

programs.name: Matrix
programs.description: Matrix-style scrolling display effect running on Integer BASIC.

programs.name: Microchess
programs.description: One of the first chess programs for a home computer. By Peter Jennings, 1976.

programs.name: Shut the Box
programs.description: Classic dice game. Roll the dice and flip down numbered tiles until the box is shut. By Jeff Jetton.

programs.name: Slots
programs.description: Slot machine game running on Integer BASIC.

programs.name: Star Trek
programs.description: Command the Enterprise against Klingon forces in the classic text-based Star Trek strategy game.

programs.name: Star Trek 2003
programs.description: Enhanced 2003 version of the Star Trek text strategy game with additional features.

programs.name: Volksforth
programs.description: A Forth language interpreter for the Apple 1.

programs.name: Wumpus
programs.description: Hunt the Wumpus through a network of caves. Classic text-based logic and deduction game.
